title: Codex 邀请好友送速率限制重置
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
OpenAI Developers
@OpenAIDevs
Invite a friend to Codex and add another reset to the bank.
When they send their first Codex message, you’ll both bank one to use when you need it.
Rate limit banking is rolling out to Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users, with the first reset on us.
OpenAI
@OpenAI
3h
We heard you wanted to use Codex rate limit resets on your own time.
Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability to save rate limit resets to use later.
We’re starting Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users with one free reset:
00:00
12:12 AM · Jun 12, 2026 67K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Codex 邀请好友送速率限制重置
discovery_record.discovery_summary: OpenAI 为 Codex 推出"邀请好友"功能：用户邀请朋友加入 Codex，对方发送第一条消息后，双方各获得一次速率限制（rate limit）重置额度，可存入"银行"留待需要时使用。该功能即日起向 Go、Plus、Pro 和 Business 用户逐步开放，每人首条重置免费。引用推文指出，用户现在可自主保存 rate limit 重置，不再受限于固定时间点。

key_excerpts.text: OpenAI 为 Codex 推出"邀请好友"功能：用户邀请朋友加入 Codex，对方发送第一条消息后，双方各获得一次速率限制（rate limit）重置额度，可存入"银行"留待需要时使用。该功能即日起向 Go、Plus、Pro 和 Business 用户逐步开放，每人首条重置免费。引用推文指出，用户现在可自主保存 rate limit 重置，不再受限于固定时间点。
Post Log in Sign up Post OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs Invite a friend to Codex and add another reset to the bank.
When they send their first Codex message, you’ll both bank one to use when you need it.
Rate limit banking is rolling out to Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users, with the first reset on us.
OpenAI @OpenAI 3h We heard you wanted to use Codex rate limit resets on your own time.
Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability to save rate limit resets to use later.

quotes: 功能：用户邀请朋友加入 Codex，对方发送第一条消息后，双方各获得一次速率限制（rate limit）重置额度，可存入
